action.reasoning: Observation: Starting the experiment. Analysis: Need to establish a baseline model, training pipeline, and prediction script to measure iteration time and get an initial worst-region accuracy score. I will use the pre-downloaded CLIP ViT-B/16 model, fine-tune it for 3 epochs using Accelerate on 4 GPUs, and submit for evaluation. Decision: Write model.py, dataset.py, train.py, and predict.py, then run training and submit eval.
